Notice Of Special Motion To Strike And Special Motion To Strike Complaint And Request For Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Sep-02-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
David Marek, Esq.917-721-5042 david@marekfirm.com, The Marek Law Firm for Plaintiff.
Zuzana Ikels, Esq. 415-554-3900 415-554-3900 zuzana.ikels@sfcityatty.org City Attorney's Office for Defendants.
Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 925-954-9888, raquel@transcriptlegal.com (Zoom)

ARGUED. Defense counsel Zuzana Ikels contests and argues protected activity, negligence per se, no duty breached, quasi judicial immunity, cites CA supreme court cases. Mr. Marek responds there is an order to seal and statute which is applicable. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DIANE BRYAN, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Strike And Special Motion To Strike Complaint And Request For Attorneys' Fees.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco and Diane Bryan's special motion to strike under the anti-SLAPP statute is Taken Under Submission.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 925-954-9888, raquel@transcriptlegal.com (Zoom). (302/JMQ)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-11-2025 Continued To Oct-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301

Notice Of Special Motion To Strike And Special Motion To Strike Complaint And Request For Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Jul-25-2025 Continued To Aug-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS DIANE BRYAN, AND CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Special Motion To Strike Complaint And Request For Attorneys' Fees.

The peremptory challenge by plaintiff Maury Blackman is granted. Per order of the Presiding Judge, this case is transferred to Department 302. Defendants' special motion to strike shall be heard on August 11, 2025, by Judge Quinn in Department 302 at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
